faqs.answer: Cockroach extermination in Westfield typically costs between $350 and $550, depending on the size of your property and severity of the infestation. We provide free inspections and transparent pricing before any treatment begins.

faqs.question: Are your cockroach treatments safe for children and pets?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved products and family-safe application methods for all cockroach treatments in Westfield homes. Our technicians will provide specific safety instructions, but most treatments allow residents and pets to return within a few hours.
